titles.title: evolved: open software for teaching evolutionary biology through virtual inquiries

citation.article_title: Ecological and biogeographic drivers of biodiversity cannot be resolved using clade age-richness data

citation.article_title: Radiation of extant cetaceans driven by restructuring of the oceans
citation.author: Steeman

Radiation of extant cetaceans driven by restructuring of the oceans. Systematic Biology, 58(6), 573–585. https://doi.org/10.1093/sysbio/syp060

citation.article_title: Inferring the mammal tree: Species-level sets of phylogenies for questions in ecology, evolution, and conservation
